UserGuidance: GENERAL ARRANGEMENT PLANS: Only rooms will be tagged. Use this series for overall layout documentation showing room names and numbers.
DEMOLITION PLANS: No automatic tagging. Use this series to show elements to be removed. Manually tag elements as needed.
AREA PLANS: Rooms will be tagged showing areas. Requires GIA or GEA area scheme in project. Creates area boundary views for space calculations.
FIRE STRATEGY: Tags rooms, fire-rated walls (AUK_Wall_*) and fire doors (AUK_Door_*). Ensure wall types and door families follow AUK naming convention for automatic tagging.
PARTITION WALLS: Tags rooms and partition walls only. Wall types must contain 'AUK_Wall_Partition_' to be tagged (e.g. AUK_Wall_Partition_P2_122mm). External and structural walls will be skipped.
CORE WALLS: Tags rooms and core walls. Wall types must contain 'AUK_Wall_' to be tagged. Use for stair cores, lift shafts, and service risers.
EXTERNAL OPENINGS: Tags rooms, external doors (AUK_Door_*) and windows (AUK_Window_*). Ensure door and window families follow AUK naming for automatic tagging.
INTERNAL DOORS: Tags rooms and internal doors only. Door families must contain 'AUK_Door_' to be tagged. Use for door schedules and coordination.
REFLECTED CEILING PLANS: Creates RCP views and tags rooms and ceilings. Note: Walls, doors, and windows are not visible in RCP views.
WALL FINISHES: Tags rooms and walls containing 'AUK_Wall_'. Use for finish schedules and material coordination. Check wall type parameters for finish information.
